arts.ttl: Raphinha says Olmo situation could deter players from joining Barca
arts.sum: Raphinha also said he’s hoping that the situation will be resolved soon and that the two players can return to action. The two players are currently ineligible to play for Barcelona, although the club are hoping to get the duo re-registered for the rest of the season.

arts.ttl: Dani Olmo re-registration saga will make players 'THINK TWICE' before signing for Barcelona, claims Raphinha - with Spanish star still unable to play for Catalan giants amid financial issues
arts.sum: Barcelona star Raphinha has claimed the saga surrounding Dani Olmo's re-registration could impact the club's transfer business in the future.

arts.ttl: Flick, Deco & Laporta agree on Barcelona’s transfer priority for January
arts.sum: Three leading figures at La Liga giants Barcelona have reached a consensus that one area of the club’s squad is in need of reinforcement with a view to the 2nd…

arts.ttl: Barcelona transfer news: Important player seeking to force move to European giants this window?
arts.sum: Barcelona defender Ronald Araujo is reportedly pushing for a loan move to Juventus this January after falling down the pecking order at the club.

arts.ttl: Barcelona's Raphinha: Olmo saga could affect future transfers
arts.sum: "I think it could," Raphinha said in a news conference on Tuesday when asked if the situation could force players to turn down the chance of signing for Barça. Olmo and Víctor were both unregistered on Jan. 1 after Barça missed a Dec. 31 deadline to prove they are compliant with LaLiga's financial fair play regulations.

arts.ttl: Atlético Madrid the latest club tipped to bring ex-Barcelona star back to La Liga
arts.sum: Diego Simeone’s Atlético Madrid have this week been credited with an interest in the signature of a one-time member of the midfield ranks at La Liga rivals Barcelona. That’s according…

arts.ttl: Athletic Club handed Nico Williams scare ahead of Barcelona clash
arts.sum: An altogether concerning development on the personnel front has been confirmed in the Athletic Club squad on Tuesday. This comes amid confirmation that star attacker Nico Williams was forced to…

arts.ttl: Barcelona superstar 'says YES' to shock transfer after €100m rumours
arts.sum: Barcelona defender Ronald Araujo has given the green light to a loan move to Juventus, according to Italian media. While he may no longer fetch Barcelona €100m, he could once again free up vital salary space and Juventus are keen to pounce on this potential opportunity.

arts.ttl: Barcelona make final Olmo appeal as 'unprecedented' transfer mooted
arts.sum: However, as the club had missed the initial December 31 deadline and the duo's playing licenses subsequently expired - with players only permitted to have one license per season - LaLiga and the RFEF decided to reject Barcelona's appeal, forcing the Catalans to take the matter to court. However, should the CSD also reject their appeal, as two Spanish courts have already done previously, then Barcelona may have to seek an unprecedented and radical solution.

arts.ttl: 2 doubts for Hansi Flick: Barcelona’s predicted XI to face Athletic Club in Spanish Super Cup
arts.sum: An insight into the personnel plans of the coaching staff at La Liga giants Barcelona for their upcoming meeting with Athletic Club has today been provided. Barcelona are of course…
